checks.name: Destructive Operations Detection
checks.description: Detect DROP/RENAME operations that can delete or orphan data
checks.question: This change will affect existing data. Do you have a backup?

checks.name: New Field Defaults
checks.description: New required fields must have defaults or explicit backfill plan
checks.question: New required field detected. What's the backfill strategy for existing rows?

checks.name: Enum Compatibility
checks.description: Enum changes must not break existing application logic or data
checks.question: Enum change detected. Are all existing values still valid in your code?

checks.name: Nullability Changes
checks.description: Converting required field to optional is safe; optional to required needs migration plan
checks.question: Changing field nullability. How will existing data be handled?

checks.name: Field Type Changes
checks.description: Type conversions may lose data or break validation
checks.question: Changing field type. Is a data conversion/validation strategy needed?

decision_tree.step_2: Is this adding a new required field?
decision_tree.step_2_no_plan: BLOCKED - Needs default or migration plan
decision_tree.step_3_yes: Check existing code for enum usage
decision_tree.step_3_unsafe: BLOCKED - Values removed/renamed (needs code updates first)
